overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The scene transitions from a covered walkway lined with massive digital billboards to an open plaza featuring the DELAMAIN building, then crosses a wet neon-lit street. Heavy rain creates reflective surfaces on the pavement while pedestrians with umbrellas populate the futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with massive digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor, following a pedestrian in a plaid shirt

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in plaid shirt walking ahead at steady pace

entered.detail: massive curved digital billboard structure with purple frames displaying various advertisements
tall concrete barrier wall with metal railings on top
tall palm trees visible behind the concrete barrier
dark metal framework and pipes covering the walkway ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban corridor with towering purple-framed digital billboards on the left wall displaying various advertisements. The right side features a concrete retaining wall with palm trees visible behind it. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights from the screens above. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, with one in a plaid shirt leading the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with corporate headquarters

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza revealing the DELAMAIN building ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the DELAMAIN building through the open plaza, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive corporate building with illuminated DELAMAIN signage and glass facade
tall vertical red billboard with ZERO RUSH text and character image
wide staircase with yellow edges leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza as the covered walkway ends. The DELAMAIN building dominates the center view with its illuminated corporate signage. A large red ZERO RUSH billboard stands prominently on the left. The ground transitions to wet paved tiles reflecting the surrounding neon. Pedestrians with umbrellas move through the plaza, and the camera approaches the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk with street-level commercial fronts

events.description: turns left to cross the street away from the DELAMAIN building
steps onto pedestrian crosswalk with white striped markings

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the wet street via the crosswalk, moving past a purple kiosk

entered.detail: broad white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
small purple booth with illuminated signage and glass windows
modern building with extensive glass windows and green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to cross the street, leaving the DELAMAIN plaza behind. The camera moves across a wet pedestrian crosswalk with prominent white stripes. A distinctive purple kiosk stands on the left corner, while modern glass buildings line the right side. Palm trees now appear on the left as the camera continues down the street past various neon-lit storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor that opens into a corporate plaza before crossing a rain-slicked city street. It begins within a covered walkway where towering purple digital billboards cast vibrant reflections onto the wet asphalt as the camera follows pedestrians forward. As the corridor ends, the scene expands into a wide plaza dominated by the illuminated signage of the Delamain building and a prominent red Zero Rush billboard. The camera then approaches the building entrance before turning left to leave the plaza behind, transitioning onto a wet pedestrian crosswalk marked by bold white stripes. Finally, the movement continues past a purple kiosk and glass buildings, gliding down the street alongside palm trees and glowing storefronts.
